---
title: "test_personas_retheme_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_personas_retheme_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.70
style_score: 4.05
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.27
---

## Intent
The `test_personas_retheme_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_odin_retheme_docs_creates_dir. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_odin_retheme_docs_creates_dir. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.personas](file://src.core.personas)
- [pytest](file://pytest)

### Exports
- `test_odin_retheme_docs_creates_dir`
